title: NADE Position Papers Index (1999-2006)
description: A dated link index of NADE position papers from 1999 through 2006, each entry pairing a date with a title and a link to the paper (many to .doc/.htm/.pdf documents on nade.org or to NADE news permalink pages). Topics include the IOM Interim Report response, the Disability Process Improvement Initiative, elimination of the five-month and 24-month Medicare waiting periods, the CDI and Medical Consultant position papers, in-line quality review, a 'New Approach to SSA Disability Determinations', MIRS exceptions, and SSA certification of disability examiners. Scraped from the official NADE site.
update_cadence: as new position papers are published
notes: Authoritative: direct capture of NADE's Position Papers index page (source URL preserved). This is a link list, not the papers themselves; the linked targets (.doc/.htm/.pdf and news permalinks) are NOT captured here. temporal_coverage spans the dated entries (1999-07-19 to 2006-03-27). The 2004 Disability Examiner Position Paper that appears in this index is separately captured as external/nade/examiner-position-paper.
